name: CTT PHARMACEUTICAL HOLDINGS, INC.
business: CTT Pharma develops an orally administrable wafer for fast-dissolving drug delivery, initially targeting pain management using cannabis extracts. The company is a development stage enterprise with no revenues to date and relies on third-party manufacturers.

exposures.sentence: CTT Pharma's focus is fast dissolving drug delivery systems. The company's technology platform includes the development of advanced oral delivery thin wafers infused with both natural and/or synthetic cannabis extracts (THC, annabinoids, Terpenes) for pain management and treatment.

tamClaims.claim: The annual cost of chronic pain is as high as $635 billion per year.
tamClaims.sentence: In a 2012 report from health economists from John Hopkins University published a report in The Journal of Pain (Volume 13, No.8 2012) researchers estimated that the annual cost of chronic pain is as high as $635 billion per year.
